name: Bm Magic Heavenly Whole Wheat
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the bread machine to a light setting.
2. Combine all ingredients in the bread machine and mix according to the machine's instructions.
3. Place the dough on a lightly floured surface and shape it into a loaf.
4. Transfer the shaped dough to a greased baking pan.
5. Bake until the loaf is golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped.
6. Allow the loaf to cool before slicing.
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - =
